issues.title: Fix duplicate example in Vector Databases documentation
issues.body:
## Issue

I noticed a duplicate example in the Vector Databases documentation.

At line 392 in the [vectordbs.adoc file](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/29002dfc0df9066caabdf584194e9fe61c283d6c/spring-ai-docs/src/main/antora/modules/ROOT/pages/api/vectordbs.adoc?plain=1#L392), there's a redundant example that's identical to the one shown a few lines earlier: 

```java
Expression exp = b.and(b.eq("genre", "drama"), b.gte("year", 2020)).build();
```

This appears right after introducing the `IN`, `NIN`, and `NOT` operators, but doesn't actually demonstrate these operators.

## Suggested improvement

Replace the duplicate example with examples that actually demonstrate the `IN`, `NIN`, and `NOT` operators:

```java
Expression exp = b.and(b.in("genre", "drama", "documentary"), b.not(b.lt("year", 2020))).build();
```

I'm planning to submit a PR for this fix shortly.
